title: truncate one partition ,the 'create_time' of all partition tables has been updated
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
create partition table
```sql
CREATE TABLE t ( a INT, b INT, INDEX idx(b)) 
    PARTITION BY RANGE( a ) (
    PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (10000),
    PARTITION p2 VALUES LESS THAN (20000),
    PARTITION p3 VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE) ) ;
```
check the `create_time`
``` sql
select table_name,partition_name,tidb_partition_id,create_time from information_schema.partitions where table_name = 't';
```
truncate one partition `p1`
```sql
alter table t truncate partition p1;
```
check the `create_time` , 
```sql
select table_name,partition_name,tidb_partition_id,create_time from information_schema.partitions where table_name = 't';
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
'create_time' of partition `p1` was updated, and `create_time` of other partitions was not updated.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
The 'creat_time' of all partition tables has been updated
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/432302e6-3a28-4282-b805-5e58b48e641f)

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v7.5.3
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 70bfd90035cc81e80d78b4f1f76ca4baef8a5756
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-07-31 13:17:12
GoVersion: go1.21.10
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 ( id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) PARTITION BY RANGE( id ) ( PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (50), PARTITION p2 VALUES LESS THAN (100), PARTITION p3 VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE) );
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM t2 WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE t2 TRUNCATE PARTITION p1;
SELECT table_name, partition_name, partition_ordinal_position, create_time FROM information_schema.partitions WHERE table_name = 't2';
key_bug_features: Truncating one partition updates all partition create_times
